spec.fn:
selected_name = flow["select employee"]["Employee Info"].output["Select employee"]
#flow["select employee"]["Employee Info"].output["Select employee"].name

employee_list = flow.private.employeeProfile

selected_employee = None

for emp in employee_list:
    if emp["name"] == selected_name:
        selected_employee = emp
        break

self.output.selectedEmployee = selected_employee
